env.note: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL present in both Production and Preview (p0-seo-foundation) environments via `vercel env ls`

sitemap.note: 442 <loc> entries confirmed. Zero image sitemap entries — ready for seo-eng T4 to add.

robots.fullContent:
User-Agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /s/

User-Agent: *
Allow: /api/og/

Sitemap: https://estrevia.app/sitemap.xml
notes: Disallow: /api/ is present — standard, blocks internal API endpoints.
Second user-agent block allows /api/og/ — correct, needed for OG image generation.
No Disallow: /es/ — /es/* pages will be crawled correctly.
No Disallow: /sidereal- — future /sidereal-{sign}-dates pages will be crawled correctly.

esCurlMatrix.note: Trailing slash redirect — standard Next.js behavior (trailingSlash: false default). Not a regression.

deviationsFromExpected.explanation: Next.js removes trailing slashes by default (trailingSlash config). /es/ → 308 → /es → 200. Page accessible. Not a blocker for seo-eng T4/T5/T6.

summary: All critical checks pass. sitemap=442, image entries=0 (seo-eng adds in T4), robots intact, /es/* all resolve to 200 (one trailing-slash 308 is expected Next.js behavior), canonical+lang correct on /es/why-sidereal. Green light for T4/T5/T6.
